steps.title: Compare the track data
steps.content: La Torre 6B has a 28.9 cm footprint, shorter than La Torre 6A's 32.8 cm footprint. Its average stride is 5.57 m, longer than La Torre 6A's 5.23 m stride.

steps.title: Match both comparisons
steps.content: Choice A gets the footprint wrong, Choice B gets both comparisons wrong, and Choice D gets the stride wrong. The choice must say shorter footprint and longer average stride. The answer is C.
